distance_km.note: Search results confirm total distance of 190km across three stages: 60km + 50km + 80km

elevation_m.note: Search results provide elevation profile descriptions and mention challenging climbs and fells, but do not specify total elevation gain in meters

country.note: Multiple sources confirm the event is held in Finland, specifically in West Lapland

region.note: Confirmed as Lapland (West Lapland/Fell Lapland), specifically in the Pallas-Yllästunturi National Park area near Muonio

discipline.note: Search results explicitly state races use 'free technique' or 'freestyle technique.' Source [1] mentions 'both classic and free style tracks' are available on trails, but the official competition races themselves are freestyle only, not both disciplines

typical_participants.note: Source [1] states 'hundreds of cross-country skiers' participate, but no specific number around 500 is provided in search results

year_founded.note: Multiple sources confirm the event has been organized since 1978

official_website.note: Official website URL confirmed in search results

typical_race_date.note: Confirmed as early April. Search results show 2025 dates as April 7, 9, and 11; organized annually in April
